name: Republica Dominicana Red Beans & Rice (Arroz
recipeInstructions:
1. Soak the beans in water overnight or for at least 8 hours, then drain.
2. In a large cooking pot, add the beans and all other ingredients. Bring to a boil, then reduce to moderate-low heat and cook for about 1 hour until most of the water is absorbed. Add more water if needed and stir every 10 minutes.
3. When the beans have 30 minutes left, prepare the rice by adding it and water to a saucepan. Bring to a boil, then reduce heat and cover. Simmer until all water is absorbed, about 30 minutes. Turn off heat and let sit covered for an additional 10 minutes.
4. Serve beans over rice.
5. Serve with sliced avocado (aguacate), fried plaintain chips (platanos fritos), and cornbread (served fried like hush-puppies).
6. For dessert, serve fruit such as papaya with coconut and expresso coffee (Dominican style expresso: fill demitasse cup 1/2 full with raw sugar, then add strong expresso coffee).
